old_value:
{"id":"project-LICHEN-3do3","title":"firmware_version validation logic duplicated in adapter.c and codec.c","description":"Files: 
- lichen/subsys/lichen/meshtastic/adapter.c:1235-1273 (has_compatible_firmware_brand, starts_with_lichen_brand)
- lichen/subsys/lichen/meshtastic/codec.c:477-511 (info_firmware_version)

Both files independently implement the same firmware version validation logic:
1. Check string starts with LICHEN brand
2. Scan for 'meshtastic' substring (case-insensitive)
3. Reject if found

If the validation rules change, both implementations must be updated.

Fix: Extract the validation into a single shared function.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:48:11.820437Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T06:48:11.820467Z"}

new_value: Duplication removed; shared function lichen_meshtastic_has_compatible_firmware_brand now in codec.c and used by both adapter and info_firmware_version. Behavior and tests preserved.
